goal: Collect real digest-pinned Docker image build/save/run evidence for at least one CUDA lora_adapter export, including native and OpenAI-compatible runtime transcripts with a read-only model-cache mount, without changing backend, DB, worker, export runtime, benchmark, FE, or release sign-off logic.
head: dd48a42
blocked_scope: Runtime template, loader, verifier, or schema changes
DB schema, migration, or model changes
Benchmark number edits or invented benchmark claims
allowed_edit_paths_scope_note: This gate records real Docker evidence only. If evidence collection reveals a product bug, stop and create a new implementation contract before code edits.
required_evidence: Digest-pinned base image reference used for real docker build
Docker build/save transcript or failure transcript with root cause
Saved image tar sha256 if build succeeds
Docker run transcript with read-only MIB_MODEL_CACHE_DIR mount if build succeeds
HTTP transcript for /agents/{agent_id}/run if container starts
HTTP transcript for /v1/chat/completions if container starts
Export secret scan/SBOM/CVE evidence for built image or failure boundary
executed_verification_commands: docker run --rm getbeta-backend:latest python -m pip show fastapi uvicorn pydantic PyYAML jsonschema

docker run -d --name mib-docker-evidence-fa97 -p 127.0.0.1:18080:8000 -v /tmp/mib-docker-evidence/model_cache:/models:ro -e MIB_MODEL_CACHE_DIR=/models -e MIB_RUNTIME_ALLOW_FAKE_BACKEND=1 -e MIB_RUNTIME_BEARER_TOKEN=<redacted> mib-export-fa97e7ed5a0244a09c66b270939bcd54:latest

failed_verification_commands.reason: real build/save completed, but the existing test still asserts context-tar contents against the real Docker image tar
scanner treats Docker image tar manifest.json list as the MIB export manifest object

failed_verification_commands.command: docker run exported image with read-only model cache mount
failed_verification_commands.reason: container exits with ModuleNotFoundError: No module named 'agents' before HTTP endpoints bind

warnings: This phase does not make M6-RC GO; it collects evidence needed before a later scoped M6-RC re-review.
No product code may be changed in this evidence-only contract.
Docker pull/build may require network and daemon access; failures must be recorded as evidence, not hidden as success.

phase_notes.plan: Collect real Docker build/save/run evidence for a CUDA lora_adapter export using the existing implementation.
phase_notes.audit: Read Docker export spec, M6 Security/DevEx/CTO blockers, export_docker worker, Dockerfile, runtime entrypoint, runtime smoke tests, export API tests, and local Docker/image/cache state.
phase_notes.build: Collected real Docker build/save evidence with a local digest-pinned Python base image and recorded NOT_GO blocker evidence in artifacts/review/docker_runtime_evidence.md.
phase_notes.check: Default Docker export test, export secret scan self-test, task JSON, and unstaged diff whitespace checks pass. Real image evidence found blocking failures documented in the evidence artifact.

pabcd.approved_scope: Docker evidence artifacts and operational closeout only.
pabcd.blocked_scope: No product code, spec, review, FE, schema, benchmark, export behavior, or release sign-off changes.
pabcd.phase_completion_git_policy: When verification/evidence commands finish, stage, commit, and push this phase.
pabcd.plan: Create scoped Docker evidence collection contract.
pabcd.build: Real Docker build/save and run attempt evidence recorded.
pabcd.check: Evidence phase verification passed; real Docker RC evidence remains NOT_GO due blocking product/runtime issues.
